wallpapers.name: View From Murren
wallpapers.description: The view from the Gondola station in Murren, Switzerland. Facing Jungfraujoch, The Top of Europe, the highest mountain in the Alps.

wallpapers.name: Lucerne Ferry Ride
wallpapers.description: The mountain views from the Lucerne Ferry Ride. A little blur since my digital camera died XD.

wallpapers.name: Lake Del Valle
wallpapers.description: A beautiful lakeside hike in Livermore, California. My grand-big Maanvi seen stretching in the bottom left.

wallpapers.name: A Very Serious Hike
wallpapers.description: The base of a hike in Grindelwald, Switzerland. The view was breathtaking and ensueing cardio certainly was too.

wallpapers.name: The Eiffel Tower
wallpapers.description: The view of the Eiffel Tower from the Basilique du Sacré-Cœur de Montmartre.

wallpapers.name: The Arc de Triomphe
wallpapers.description: The view of the Arc de Triomphe from the Champs-Élysées. It was a beautiful day in Paris.

wallpapers.name: Lake Lucerne's Crisp Water
wallpapers.description: The crisp water on Lake Lucerne, taken from the ferry ride. The air tasted like pure oxygen.

wallpapers.name: Spring in Switzerland
wallpapers.description: Switzerland in spring was half frozen, half melted, and half in bloom. It was a stunning sight.

wallpapers.name: Tulips in the Netherlands
wallpapers.description: Tulips in the Keukenhof Gardens in the Netherlands. And a really sick windmill in the background.

wallpapers.name: A Maze
wallpapers.description: A maze in the Keukenhof Gardens in the Netherlands. 40km out from Amsterdam.
